adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Current official lunch/dinner page covers food and nonalcoholic menu categories and both locations.
Current Toast Reston menu at 11130 M South Lakes Dr.
Current Toast Dulles menu at 21305 Windmill Parc Dr.
2022 printable menu retained as stale supporting evidence.
Official Cafesano homepage identifies the two Virginia locations.
Official locations page separately lists Reston and Dulles.

notes: POC worker artifacts persisted by the root coordinator.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
